types.name: IssueNotification
types.description: A notification related to an issue, such as assignment, comment, mention, status change, or priority change.

fields.name: commentId
fields.description: Related comment ID. Null if the notification is not related to a comment.

fields.name: parentCommentId
fields.description: Related parent comment ID. Null if the notification is not related to a comment.

fields.name: reactionEmoji
fields.description: Name of the reaction emoji related to the notification.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the entity.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description:
The last time at which the entity was meaningfully updated. This is the same as the creation time if the entity hasn't
    been updated after creation.

fields.name: archivedAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was archived. Null if the entity has not been archived.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Notification type. Determines the kind of event that triggered this notification and which associated entity fields will be populated.

fields.name: actor
fields.description: The user that caused the notification. Null if the notification was triggered by a non-user actor such as an integration, external user, or system event.

fields.name: externalUserActor
fields.description: The external user that caused the notification. Populated when the notification was triggered by an external user (e.g., a commenter from a connected integration like Slack or GitHub) rather than a Linear workspace member.

fields.name: user
fields.description: The recipient user of this notification.

fields.name: readAt
fields.description: The time at which the user marked the notification as read. Null if the notification is unread.

fields.name: emailedAt
fields.description: The time at which an email reminder for this notification was sent to the user. Null if no email reminder has been sent.

fields.name: snoozedUntilAt
fields.description: The time until which a notification is snoozed. After this time, the notification reappears in the user's inbox. Null if the notification is not currently snoozed.

fields.name: unsnoozedAt
fields.description: The time at which a notification was unsnoozed. Null if the notification has not been unsnoozed.

fields.name: category
fields.description: The category of the notification.

fields.name: url
fields.description: [Internal] URL to the target of the notification.

fields.name: inboxUrl
fields.description: [Internal] Inbox URL for the notification.

fields.name: title
fields.description: [Internal] Notification title.

fields.name: subtitle
fields.description: [Internal] Notification subtitle.

fields.name: isLinearActor
fields.description: [Internal] If notification actor was Linear.

fields.name: actorAvatarUrl
fields.description: [Internal] Notification avatar URL.

fields.name: actorInitials
fields.description: [Internal] Notification actor initials if avatar is not available.

fields.name: actorAvatarColor
fields.description: [Internal] Notification actor initials if avatar is not available.

fields.name: issueStatusType
fields.description: [Internal] Issue's status type for issue notifications.

fields.name: projectUpdateHealth
fields.description: [Internal] Project update health for new updates.

fields.name: initiativeUpdateHealth
fields.description: [Internal] Initiative update health for new updates.

fields.name: groupingKey
fields.description: [Internal] Notifications with the same grouping key will be grouped together in the UI.

fields.name: groupingPriority
fields.description: [Internal] Priority of the notification with the same grouping key. Higher number means higher priority. If priority is the same, notifications should be sorted by `createdAt`.

fields.name: botActor
fields.description: The bot that caused the notification.

fields.name: issueId
fields.description: Related issue ID.

fields.name: issue
fields.description: The issue related to the notification.

fields.name: comment
fields.description: The comment related to the notification.

fields.name: parentComment
fields.description: The parent comment related to the notification, if a notification is a reply comment notification.

fields.name: team
fields.description: The team related to the issue notification.

fields.name: subscriptions
fields.description: The subscriptions related to the notification.

types.name: Notification
types.description: A notification delivered to a user's inbox. Notifications are created in response to activity in the workspace such as issue assignments, comments, mentions, and status changes. Each notification has a specific type that determines the associated entity (issue, project, document, etc.) and the nature of the event. Notifications can be read, snoozed, or archived by the user.

types.name: ID
types.description: The `ID` scalar type represents a unique identifier, often used to refetch an object or as key for a cache. The ID type appears in a JSON response as a String; however, it is not intended to be human-readable. When expected as an input type, any string (such as `"4"`) or integer (such as `4`) input value will be accepted as an ID.

types.name: DateTime
types.description: Represents a date and time in ISO 8601 format. Accepts shortcuts like `2021` to represent midnight Fri Jan 01 2021. Also accepts ISO 8601 durations strings which are added to the current date to create the represented date (e.g '-P2W1D' represents the date that was two weeks and 1 day ago)

types.name: String
types.description: The `String` scalar type represents textual data, represented as UTF-8 character sequences. The String type is most often used by GraphQL to represent free-form human-readable text.

types.name: User
types.description: A user that belongs to a workspace. Users can have different roles (admin, member, guest, or app) that determine their level of access. Users can be members of multiple teams, and can be active or deactivated. Guest users have limited access scoped to specific teams they are invited to.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the entity.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description:
The last time at which the entity was meaningfully updated. This is the same as the creation time if the entity hasn't
    been updated after creation.

fields.name: archivedAt

fields.name: name
fields.description: The user's full name.

fields.name: displayName
fields.description: The user's display (nick) name. Must be unique within the workspace.

fields.name: email
fields.description: The user's email address.

fields.name: avatarUrl
fields.description: An URL to the user's avatar image.

fields.name: disableReason
fields.description: The reason why the user account is disabled. Null if the user is active. Possible values include admin suspension, downgrade, voluntary departure, or pending invite.

fields.name: calendarHash
fields.description: [DEPRECATED] Hash for the user to be used in calendar URLs.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A short description of the user, such as their title or a brief bio.

fields.name: title
fields.description: The user's job title.

fields.name: statusEmoji
fields.description: The emoji representing the user's current status. Null if no status is set.

fields.name: statusLabel
fields.description: The text label of the user's current status. Null if no status is set.

fields.name: statusUntilAt
fields.description: The date and time at which the user's current status should be automatically cleared. Null if the status has no expiration.

fields.name: timezone
fields.description: The local timezone of the user.

fields.name: organization
fields.description: The workspace that the user belongs to.

fields.name: lastSeen
fields.description: The last time the user was seen online. Updated based on user activity. Null if the user has never been seen.

fields.name: identityProvider
fields.description: [INTERNAL] Identity provider the user is managed by.

fields.name: initials
fields.description: The initials of the user.

fields.name: avatarBackgroundColor
fields.description: The background color of the avatar for users without set avatar.

fields.name: guest
fields.description: Whether the user is a guest in the workspace and limited to accessing a subset of teams.

fields.name: app
fields.description: Whether the user is an app.

fields.name: isMentionable
fields.description: Whether the user is mentionable.

fields.name: active
fields.description: Whether the user account is active or disabled (suspended).

fields.name: issueDrafts
fields.description: Issue drafts that the user has created but not yet submitted.

fields.name: canAccessAnyPublicTeam
fields.description: Whether this user can access any public team in the workspace. True for non-guest members and app users with public team access.

fields.name: isMe
fields.description: Whether the user is the currently authenticated user.

fields.name: admin
fields.description: Whether the user is a workspace administrator. On Free plans, all members are treated as admins.

fields.name: owner
fields.description: Whether the user is a workspace owner, which is the highest permission level.

fields.name: isAssignable
fields.description: Whether the user can be assigned to issues. Regular users are always assignable; app users are assignable only if they have the app:assignable scope.

fields.name: supportsAgentSessions
fields.description: Whether this agent user supports agent sessions.

fields.name: inviteHash
fields.description: [DEPRECATED] Unique hash for the user to be used in invite URLs.
fields.deprecationReason: This hash is not in use anymore, this value will always be empty.

fields.name: gitHubUserId
fields.description: The user's GitHub user ID.

types.name: Organization
types.description: A workspace (referred to as Organization in the API). Workspaces are the root-level container for all teams, users, projects, issues, and settings. Every user belongs to at least one workspace, and all data is scoped within a workspace boundary.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the entity.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description:
The last time at which the entity was meaningfully updated. This is the same as the creation time if the entity hasn't
    been updated after creation.

fields.name: archivedAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was archived. Null if the entity has not been archived.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The workspace's name.

fields.name: urlKey
fields.description: The workspace's unique URL key, used in URLs to identify the workspace.

fields.name: logoUrl
fields.description: The URL of the workspace's logo image. Null if no logo has been uploaded.

fields.name: periodUploadVolume
fields.description: Rolling 30-day total file upload volume for the workspace, measured in megabytes. Used for enforcing upload quotas.

fields.name: facets
fields.description: [Internal] Facets associated with the workspace, used for configuring custom views and filters.

fields.name: gitBranchFormat
fields.description: The template format for Git branch names created from issues. Supports template variables like {issueIdentifier} and {issueTitle}. If null, the default formatting will be used.

fields.name: gitLinkbackMessagesEnabled
fields.description: Whether the Git integration linkback messages should be posted as comments on pull requests in private repositories.

fields.name: gitPublicLinkbackMessagesEnabled
fields.description: Whether the Git integration linkback messages should be posted as comments on pull requests in public repositories.

fields.name: gitLinkbackDescriptionsEnabled
fields.description: Whether issue descriptions should be included in the Git integration linkback messages posted to pull requests.

fields.name: roadmapEnabled
fields.description: Whether the roadmap feature is enabled for the workspace.

fields.name: projectUpdateReminderFrequencyInWeeks
fields.description: The frequency in weeks at which to prompt for project updates. When null, project update reminders are disabled. Valid values range from 0 to 8.

fields.name: projectUpdateRemindersDay
fields.description: The day of the week on which project update reminders are sent.

fields.name: projectUpdateRemindersHour
fields.description: The hour of the day (0-23) at which project update reminders are sent.

fields.name: initiativeUpdateReminderFrequencyInWeeks
fields.description: The frequency in weeks at which to prompt for initiative updates. When null, initiative update reminders are disabled. Valid values range from 0 to 8.

fields.name: initiativeUpdateRemindersDay
fields.description: The day of the week on which initiative update reminders are sent.

fields.name: initiativeUpdateRemindersHour
fields.description: The hour of the day (0-23) at which initiative update reminders are sent.

fields.name: fiscalYearStartMonth
fields.description: The zero-indexed month at which the fiscal year starts (0 = January, 11 = December). Defaults to 0 (January).

fields.name: workingDays
fields.description: [Internal] The list of working days. Sunday is 0, Monday is 1, etc.

fields.name: samlEnabled
fields.description: Whether SAML-based single sign-on authentication is enabled for the workspace.

fields.name: samlSettings
fields.description: [INTERNAL] SAML settings.

fields.name: scimEnabled
fields.description: Whether SCIM provisioning is enabled for the workspace, allowing automated user and team management from an identity provider.

fields.name: scimSettings
fields.description: [INTERNAL] SCIM settings.

fields.name: securitySettings
fields.description: Security settings for the workspace, including role-based restrictions for invitations, team creation, label management, and other sensitive operations.

fields.name: authSettings
fields.description: Authentication settings for the workspace, including allowed auth providers, bypass rules, and organization visibility during signup.

fields.name: allowedAuthServices
fields.description: Allowed authentication providers, empty array means all are allowed.

fields.name: allowedFileUploadContentTypes
fields.description: Allowed file upload content types

fields.name: ipRestrictions
fields.description: IP restriction configurations.

fields.name: deletionRequestedAt
fields.description: The time at which deletion of the workspace was requested. Null if no deletion has been requested.

fields.name: trialEndsAt
fields.description: The time at which the current plan trial will end. Null if the workspace is not in a trial period.

fields.name: trialStartsAt
fields.description: The time at which the current plan trial started. Null if the workspace is not in a trial period.

fields.name: previousUrlKeys
fields.description: Previously used URL keys for the workspace. The last 3 are kept and automatically redirected to the current URL key.

fields.name: restrictAgentInvocationToMembers
fields.description: [Internal] Whether agent invocation is restricted to full workspace members.

fields.name: hipaaComplianceEnabled
fields.description: Whether HIPAA compliance is enabled for the workspace. When enabled, certain data processing features are restricted to meet compliance requirements.

fields.name: themeSettings
fields.description: [ALPHA] Theme settings for the workspace.

fields.name: releaseChannel
fields.description: The feature release channel the workspace belongs to, which controls access to pre-release features.

fields.name: customersConfiguration
fields.description: Configuration settings for the Customers feature, including revenue currency and other customer tracking preferences.

fields.name: codeIntelligenceEnabled
fields.description: [INTERNAL] Whether code intelligence is enabled for the workspace.

fields.name: codeIntelligenceRepository
fields.description: [INTERNAL] GitHub repository in owner/repo format for code intelligence.

fields.name: defaultFeedSummarySchedule
fields.description: Default schedule for how often feed summaries are generated.

fields.name: feedEnabled
fields.description: Whether the activity feed feature is enabled for the workspace.

fields.name: hideNonPrimaryOrganizations
fields.description: Whether to hide other organizations for new users signing up with email domains claimed by this organization.

fields.name: aiAddonEnabled
fields.description: [INTERNAL] Whether the workspace has enabled the AI add-on (which at this point only includes triage suggestions).

fields.name: agentAutomationEnabled
fields.description: [INTERNAL] Whether the workspace has enabled agent automation.

fields.name: generatedUpdatesEnabled
fields.description: [INTERNAL] Whether the workspace has enabled generated updates.

fields.name: aiThreadSummariesEnabled
fields.description: Whether the workspace has enabled resolved thread AI summaries.

fields.name: aiDiscussionSummariesEnabled
fields.description: Whether the workspace has enabled AI discussion summaries for issues.

fields.name: aiProviderConfiguration
fields.description: [INTERNAL] Configure per-modality AI host providers and model families.

fields.name: linearAgentEnabled
fields.description: [Internal] Whether the workspace has enabled Linear Agent.

fields.name: linearAgentSettings
fields.description: [Internal] Settings for Linear Agent features.

fields.name: codingAgentEnabled
fields.description: [INTERNAL] Whether the workspace has enabled the Coding Agent.

fields.name: codingAgentSettings
fields.description: [Internal] Settings for Coding Agent features.

fields.name: slaDayCount
fields.description: [DEPRECATED] Which day count to use for SLA calculations.

fields.name: projectUpdatesReminderFrequency
fields.description: [DEPRECATED] The frequency at which to prompt for project updates.

fields.name: allowedAiProviders
fields.description: [INTERNAL] Permitted AI providers.

types.name: Float
types.description: The `Float` scalar type represents signed double-precision fractional values as specified by [IEEE 754](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IEEE_floating_point).

types.name: Facet
types.description: A facet representing a join between entities. Facets connect a custom view to an owning entity such as a project, initiative, team page, workspace page, or user feed. They control the order of views within their parent via the sortOrder field. Exactly one source entity and one target entity must be set.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the entity.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description:
The last time at which the entity was meaningfully updated. This is the same as the creation time if the entity hasn't
    been updated after creation.

fields.name: archivedAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was archived. Null if the entity has not been archived.

fields.name: sortOrder
fields.description: The sort order of the facet within its owning entity scope. Lower values appear first. Sort order is scoped by the source entity (e.g., all facets on a project are sorted independently from facets on an initiative).

fields.name: sourceOrganization
fields.description: The owning organization. Set for workspace-level facets that are not scoped to a specific team, project, or initiative.

fields.name: sourceTeam
fields.description: The owning team. Set when this facet represents a view on a team-level page.

fields.name: sourceProject
fields.description: The owning project. Set when this facet represents a view tab on a project.

fields.name: sourceInitiative
fields.description: The owning initiative. Set when this facet represents a view tab on an initiative.

fields.name: sourceFeedUser
fields.description: The user whose feed this facet belongs to. Set when this facet represents a view in a user's personal feed.

fields.name: sourcePage
fields.description: The fixed page type (e.g., projects, issues) that this facet is displayed on. Used together with sourceOrganizationId or sourceTeamId to place a view on a specific page at the workspace or team level.

fields.name: targetCustomView
fields.description: The custom view that this facet points to. Each facet targets exactly one custom view, establishing a one-to-one relationship.

types.name: Team
types.description: A team is the primary organizational unit in Linear. Issues belong to teams, and each team has its own workflow states, cycles, labels, and settings. Teams can be public (visible to all workspace members), private (visible only to team members), or protected (visible only within an enclosing private-team boundary). Teams can also have sub-teams that inherit settings from their parent.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the entity.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description:
The last time at which the entity was meaningfully updated. This is the same as the creation time if the entity hasn't
    been updated after creation.

fields.name: archivedAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was archived. Null if the entity has not been archived.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The team's name.

fields.name: key
fields.description: The team's unique key, used as a prefix in issue identifiers (e.g., 'ENG' in 'ENG-123') and in URLs.

fields.name: description
fields.description: The team's description.

fields.name: icon
fields.description: The icon of the team.

fields.name: color
fields.description: The team's color.

fields.name: retiredAt
fields.description: The time at which the team was retired. Retired teams no longer accept new issues or members. Null if the team has not been retired.

fields.name: organization
fields.description: The workspace that the team belongs to.

fields.name: parent
fields.description: The team's parent team.

fields.name: children
fields.description: [Internal] The team's sub-teams.

fields.name: resourceSections
fields.description: [Internal] Sections shown on the team home that group pinned resources.

fields.name: pinnedResources
fields.description: [Internal] Documents and external links pinned to the team home, optionally grouped under sections.

fields.name: cyclesEnabled
fields.description: Whether the team uses cycles for sprint-style issue management.

fields.name: cycleStartDay
fields.description: The day of the week that a new cycle starts (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday, ..., 6 = Saturday).

fields.name: cycleDuration
fields.description: The duration of each cycle in weeks.

fields.name: cycleCooldownTime
fields.description: The cooldown time after each cycle in weeks.

fields.name: cycleIssueAutoAssignStarted
fields.description: Auto assign started issues to current cycle.

fields.name: cycleIssueAutoAssignCompleted
fields.description: Auto assign completed issues to current cycle.

fields.name: cycleLockToActive
fields.description: Auto assign issues to current cycle if in active status.

fields.name: upcomingCycleCount
fields.description: How many upcoming cycles to create.

fields.name: timezone
fields.description: The timezone of the team. Defaults to "America/Los_Angeles"

fields.name: inheritWorkflowStatuses
fields.description: Whether the team should inherit its workflow statuses from its parent. Only applies to sub-teams.

fields.name: inheritIssueEstimation
fields.description: Whether the team should inherit its estimation settings from its parent. Only applies to sub-teams.

fields.name: issueEstimationType
fields.description: The issue estimation type to use. Must be one of "notUsed", "exponential", "fibonacci", "linear", "tShirt".

fields.name: issueOrderingNoPriorityFirst
fields.description: [DEPRECATED] Whether issues without priority should be sorted first.
fields.deprecationReason: This setting is no longer in use.

fields.name: issueEstimationAllowZero
fields.description: Whether to allow zeros in issues estimates.

fields.name: setIssueSortOrderOnStateChange
fields.description: Where to move issues when changing state.

fields.name: issueEstimationExtended
fields.description: Whether to add additional points to the estimate scale.

fields.name: defaultIssueEstimate
fields.description: What to use as a default estimate for unestimated issues.

fields.name: triageEnabled
fields.description: Whether triage mode is enabled for the team. When enabled, issues created by non-members or integrations are routed to a triage state for review before entering the normal workflow.

fields.name: requirePriorityToLeaveTriage
fields.description: Whether an issue needs to have a priority set before leaving triage.

fields.name: defaultIssueState
fields.description: The default workflow state into which issues are set when they are opened by team members.

fields.name: defaultTemplateForMembers
fields.description: The default template to use for new issues created by members of the team.

fields.name: defaultTemplateForMembersId
fields.description: The id of the default template to use for new issues created by members of the team.

fields.name: defaultTemplateForNonMembers
fields.description: The default template to use for new issues created by non-members of the team.

fields.name: defaultTemplateForNonMembersId
fields.description: The id of the default template to use for new issues created by non-members of the team.

fields.name: defaultProjectTemplate
fields.description: The default template to use for new projects created for the team.

fields.name: triageIssueState
fields.description: The workflow state into which issues are set when they are opened by non-team members or integrations if triage is enabled.

fields.name: private
fields.description: Whether the team is private. Private teams are only visible to their members and require an explicit invitation to join.

fields.name: allMembersCanJoin
fields.description: Whether all members in the workspace can join the team. Only used for public teams.

fields.name: securitySettings
fields.description: Security settings for the team, including role-based restrictions for issue sharing, label management, member management, template management, and agent skills.

fields.name: facets
fields.description: [Internal] Facets associated with the team.

fields.name: posts
fields.description: [Internal] Posts associated with the team.

fields.name: scimManaged
fields.description: Whether the team is managed by a SCIM integration. SCIM-managed teams have their membership controlled by the identity provider.

fields.name: scimGroupName
fields.description: The SCIM group name for the team.

fields.name: progressHistory
fields.description: [Internal] The progress history of the team.

fields.name: currentProgress
fields.description: [Internal] The current progress of the team.

fields.name: draftWorkflowState
fields.description: The workflow state into which issues are moved when a PR has been opened as draft.

fields.name: startWorkflowState
fields.description: The workflow state into which issues are moved when a PR has been opened.

fields.name: reviewWorkflowState
fields.description: The workflow state into which issues are moved when a review has been requested for the PR.

fields.name: mergeableWorkflowState
fields.description: The workflow state into which issues are moved when a PR is ready to be merged.

fields.name: mergeWorkflowState
fields.description: The workflow state into which issues are moved when a PR has been merged.

fields.name: groupIssueHistory
fields.description: Whether to group recent issue history entries.

fields.name: aiThreadSummariesEnabled
fields.description: Whether to enable resolved thread AI summaries.

fields.name: aiDiscussionSummariesEnabled
fields.description: Whether to enable AI discussion summaries for issues in this team.

fields.name: slackNewIssue
fields.description: Whether to send new issue notifications to Slack.

fields.name: slackIssueComments
fields.description: Whether to send new issue comment notifications to Slack.

fields.name: slackIssueStatuses
fields.description: Whether to send new issue status updates to Slack.

fields.name: autoClosePeriod
fields.description: Period after which issues are automatically closed in months. Null/undefined means disabled.

fields.name: autoCloseStateId
fields.description: The canceled workflow state which auto closed issues will be set to. Defaults to the first canceled state.

fields.name: autoArchivePeriod
fields.description: Period after which automatically closed, completed, and duplicate issues are automatically archived in months.

fields.name: autoCloseParentIssues
fields.description: Whether parent issues should automatically close when all child issues are closed

fields.name: autoCloseChildIssues
fields.description: Whether child issues should automatically close when their parent issue is closed

fields.name: markedAsDuplicateWorkflowState
fields.description: The workflow state into which issues are moved when they are marked as a duplicate of another issue. Defaults to the first canceled state.

fields.name: joinByDefault
fields.description: [Internal] Whether new users should join this team by default.

fields.name: inheritSlackAutoCreateProjectChannel
fields.description: [Internal] Whether the team should inherit its Slack auto-create project channel setting from its parent. Only applies to sub-teams.

fields.name: slackAutoCreateProjectChannel
fields.description: [Internal] Whether to automatically create a Slack channel when a new project is created in this team.

fields.name: cycleCalenderUrl
fields.description: Calendar feed URL (iCal) for cycles.

fields.name: visibility
fields.description: The visibility of the team. Returns public for teams visible to all workspace members, private for teams visible only to members, and protected for non-private teams inside a private-team boundary.

fields.name: displayName
fields.description: The name of the team including its parent team name if it has one.

fields.name: ancestors
fields.description: [Internal] The team's ancestor teams, ordered from the root to the immediate parent.

fields.name: protected
fields.description: [Internal] Whether this team is protected.

fields.name: issues
fields.description: Issues belonging to the team. Supports filtering and optional inclusion of sub-team issues.

types.name: TeamResourceSection

fields.name: id

fields.name: createdAt

fields.description:
The last time at which the entity was meaningfully updated. This is the same as the creation time if the entity hasn't
    been updated after creation.

types.description: References a document or external link pinned to a team home for quick access. Pinning does not move the underlying resource; the same resource may be pinned on multiple teams.

fields.name: id

fields.name: createdAt

fields.name: section

fields.name: entityExternalLink

fields.name: updatedBy

types.name: Document
types.description: A rich-text document that lives within a project, initiative, team, issue, release, or cycle. Documents support collaborative editing via ProseMirror/Yjs and store their content in a separate DocumentContent entity. Each document is associated with exactly one parent entity.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the entity.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description:
The last time at which the entity was meaningfully updated. This is the same as the creation time if the entity hasn't
    been updated after creation.

fields.name: archivedAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was archived. Null if the entity has not been archived.

fields.name: title
fields.description: The title of the document. An empty string indicates an untitled document.

fields.name: summary
fields.description: [Internal] A one-sentence AI-generated summary of the document content. Null if no summary has been generated.

fields.name: icon
fields.description: The icon of the document, either a decorative icon type or an emoji string. Null if no icon has been set.

fields.name: color
fields.description: The hex color of the document icon. Null if no custom color has been set.

fields.name: creator
fields.description: The user who created the document. Null if the creator's account has been deleted.

fields.name: updatedBy
fields.description: The user who last updated the document. Null if the user's account has been deleted.

fields.name: project
fields.description: The project that the document is associated with. Null if the document belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: initiative
fields.description: The initiative that the document is associated with. Null if the document belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: team
fields.description: [Internal] The team that the document is associated with. Null if the document belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: issue
fields.description: The issue that the document is associated with. Null if the document belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: release
fields.description: The release that the document is associated with. Null if the document belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: cycle
fields.description: [Internal] The cycle that the document is associated with. Null if the document belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: slugId
fields.description: The document's unique URL slug, used to construct human-readable URLs.

fields.name: lastAppliedTemplate
fields.description: The last template that was applied to this document. Null if no template has been applied.

fields.name: hiddenAt
fields.description: The time at which the document was hidden from the default view. Null if the document has not been hidden.

fields.name: trashed
fields.description: A flag that indicates whether the document is in the trash bin. Trashed documents are archived and can be restored.

fields.name: sortOrder
fields.description: The sort order of the document in its parent entity's resources list. This order is shared with other resource types such as external links.

fields.name: comments

fields.description: The ID of the document content associated with the document.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The canonical url for the document.

types.name: Project
types.description: A project is a collection of issues working toward a shared goal. Projects have start and target dates, milestones, status tracking, and progress metrics. They can span multiple teams and be grouped under initiatives.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the entity.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description:
The last time at which the entity was meaningfully updated. This is the same as the creation time if the entity hasn't
    been updated after creation.

fields.name: archivedAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was archived. Null if the entity has not been archived.

fields.name: updateReminderFrequencyInWeeks
fields.description: The n-weekly frequency at which to prompt for updates. When not set, reminders are inherited from workspace.

fields.name: updateReminderFrequency
fields.description: The frequency at which to prompt for updates. When not set, reminders are inherited from workspace.

fields.name: frequencyResolution
fields.description: The resolution of the reminder frequency.

fields.name: updateRemindersDay
fields.description: The day at which to prompt for updates.

fields.name: updateRemindersHour
fields.description: The hour at which to prompt for updates.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the project.

fields.name: description
fields.description: The short description of the project.

fields.name: slugId
fields.description: The project's unique URL slug, used to construct human-readable URLs.

fields.name: icon
fields.description: The icon of the project. Can be an emoji or a decorative icon type.

fields.name: color
fields.description: The project's color as a HEX string. Used in the UI to visually identify the project.

fields.name: status
fields.description: The current project status. Defines the project's position in its lifecycle (e.g., backlog, planned, started, paused, completed, canceled).

fields.name: creator
fields.description: The user who created the project.

fields.name: lead
fields.description: The user who leads the project. The project lead is typically responsible for posting status updates and driving the project to completion. Null if no lead is assigned.

fields.name: facets
fields.description: [Internal] Facets associated with the project, used for filtering and categorization.

fields.name: projectUpdateRemindersPausedUntilAt
fields.description: The time until which project update reminders are paused. When set, no update reminders will be sent for this project until this date passes. Null means reminders are active.

fields.name: startDate
fields.description: The estimated start date of the project. Null if no start date is set.

fields.name: startDateResolution
fields.description: The resolution of the project's start date, indicating whether it refers to a specific month, quarter, half-year, or year.

fields.name: targetDate
fields.description: The estimated completion date of the project. Null if no target date is set.

fields.name: targetDateResolution
fields.description: The resolution of the project's estimated completion date, indicating whether it refers to a specific month, quarter, half-year, or year.

fields.name: startedAt
fields.description: The time at which the project was moved into a started status. Null if the project has not been started.

fields.name: completedAt
fields.description: The time at which the project was moved into a completed status. Null if the project has not been completed.

fields.name: canceledAt
fields.description: The time at which the project was moved into a canceled status. Null if the project has not been canceled.

fields.name: autoArchivedAt
fields.description: The time at which the project was automatically archived by the auto-pruning process. Null if the project has not been auto-archived.

fields.name: trashed
fields.description: A flag that indicates whether the project is in the trash bin.

fields.name: sortOrder
fields.description: The sort order for the project within the workspace. Used for manual ordering in list views.

fields.name: prioritySortOrder
fields.description: The sort order for the project within the workspace when ordered by priority.

fields.name: convertedFromIssue
fields.description: The issue that was converted into this project. Null if the project was not created from an issue.

fields.name: lastAppliedTemplate
fields.description: The last template that was applied to this project.

fields.name: priority
fields.description: The priority of the project. 0 = No priority, 1 = Urgent, 2 = High, 3 = Medium, 4 = Low.

fields.name: lastUpdate
fields.description: The most recent status update posted for this project. Null if no updates have been posted.

fields.name: health
fields.description: The overall health of the project, derived from the most recent project update. Possible values are onTrack, atRisk, or offTrack. Null if no health has been reported.

fields.name: healthUpdatedAt
fields.description: The time at which the project health was last updated, typically when a new project update is posted. Null if health has never been set.

fields.name: issueCountHistory
fields.description: The total number of issues in the project at the end of each week since project creation. Each entry represents one week.

fields.name: completedIssueCountHistory
fields.description: The number of completed issues in the project at the end of each week since project creation. Each entry represents one week.

fields.name: scopeHistory
fields.description: The total scope (estimation points) of the project at the end of each week since project creation. Each entry represents one week.

fields.name: completedScopeHistory
fields.description: The number of completed estimation points at the end of each week since project creation. Each entry represents one week.

fields.name: inProgressScopeHistory
fields.description: The number of in-progress estimation points at the end of each week since project creation. Each entry represents one week.

fields.name: progressHistory
fields.description: [INTERNAL] The progress history of the project, tracking issue completion over time.

fields.name: currentProgress
fields.description: [INTERNAL] The current progress of the project, broken down by issue status category.

fields.name: slackNewIssue
fields.description: Whether to send new issue notifications to Slack.

fields.name: slackIssueComments
fields.description: Whether to send new issue comment notifications to Slack.

fields.name: slackIssueStatuses
fields.description: Whether to send new issue status updates to Slack.

fields.name: labelIds
fields.description: The IDs of the project labels associated with this project.

fields.name: favorite
fields.description: The user's favorite associated with this project.

fields.name: url
fields.description: Project URL.

fields.name: initiatives
fields.description: Initiatives that this project belongs to.

types.name: FrequencyResolutionType
types.description: By which resolution is frequency defined.

types.name: Day
types.description: The day of the week.

types.name: ProjectStatus
types.description: A custom project status within a workspace. Statuses are grouped by type (backlog, planned, started, paused, completed, canceled) and define the lifecycle stages a project can move through. Each workspace can customize the names and colors of its project statuses.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the entity.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description:
The last time at which the entity was meaningfully updated. This is the same as the creation time if the entity hasn't
    been updated after creation.

fields.name: archivedAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was archived. Null if the entity has not been archived.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the status.

fields.name: color
fields.description: The color of the status as a HEX string, used for display in the UI.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Description of the status.

fields.name: position
fields.description: The position of the status within its type group in the workspace's project flow. Used for ordering statuses of the same type.

fields.name: type
fields.description: The category type of the project status (e.g., backlog, planned, started, paused, completed, canceled). Determines the status's behavior and position in the project lifecycle.

fields.name: indefinite
fields.description: Whether a project can remain in this status indefinitely. When false, projects in this status may trigger reminders or auto-archiving after a period of inactivity.

types.name: ProjectStatusType
types.description: A type of project status.

types.name: Boolean
types.description: The `Boolean` scalar type represents `true` or `false`.

types.name: TimelessDate
types.description: Represents a date in ISO 8601 format. Accepts shortcuts like `2021` to represent midnight Fri Jan 01 2021. Also accepts ISO 8601 durations strings which are added to the current date to create the represented date (e.g '-P2W1D' represents the date that was two weeks and 1 day ago)

types.name: DateResolutionType
types.description: By which resolution is a date defined.

types.name: Issue
types.description: An issue is the core work item in Linear. Issues belong to a team, have a workflow status, can be assigned to users, carry a priority level, and can be organized into projects and cycles. Issues support sub-issues (parent-child hierarchy up to 10 levels deep), labels, due dates, estimates, and SLA tracking. They can also be linked to other issues via relations, attached to releases, and tracked through their full history of changes.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the entity.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description:
The last time at which the entity was meaningfully updated. This is the same as the creation time if the entity hasn't
    been updated after creation.

fields.name: archivedAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was archived. Null if the entity has not been archived.

fields.name: number
fields.description: The issue's unique number, scoped to the issue's team. Together with the team key, this forms the issue's human-readable identifier (e.g., ENG-123).

fields.name: title
fields.description: The issue's title. This is the primary human-readable summary of the work item.

fields.name: priority
fields.description: The priority of the issue. 0 = No priority, 1 = Urgent, 2 = High, 3 = Medium, 4 = Low.

fields.name: estimate
fields.description: The estimate of the complexity of the issue. The specific scale used depends on the team's estimation configuration (e.g., points, T-shirt sizes). Null if no estimate has been set.

fields.name: boardOrder
fields.description: The order of the item in its column on the board.
fields.deprecationReason: Will be removed in near future, please use `sortOrder` instead

fields.name: sortOrder
fields.description: The order of the item in relation to other items in the organization. Used for manual sorting in list views.

fields.name: prioritySortOrder
fields.description: The order of the item in relation to other items in the workspace, when ordered by priority.

fields.name: startedAt
fields.description: The time at which the issue was moved into started state.

fields.name: completedAt
fields.description: The time at which the issue was moved into completed state.

fields.name: startedTriageAt
fields.description: The time at which the issue entered triage.

fields.name: triagedAt
fields.description: The time at which the issue left triage.

fields.name: canceledAt
fields.description: The time at which the issue was moved into canceled state.

fields.name: autoClosedAt
fields.description: The time at which the issue was automatically closed by the auto pruning process.

fields.name: autoArchivedAt
fields.description: The time at which the issue was automatically archived by the auto pruning process.

fields.name: dueDate
fields.description: The date at which the issue is due.

fields.name: slaStartedAt
fields.description: The time at which the issue's SLA began.

fields.name: slaMediumRiskAt
fields.description: The time at which the issue's SLA will enter medium risk state.

fields.name: slaHighRiskAt
fields.description: The time at which the issue's SLA will enter high risk state.

fields.name: slaBreachesAt
fields.description: The time at which the issue's SLA will breach.

fields.name: slaType
fields.description: The type of SLA set on the issue. Calendar days or business days.

fields.name: addedToProjectAt
fields.description: The time at which the issue was added to a project.

fields.name: addedToCycleAt
fields.description: The time at which the issue was added to a cycle.

fields.name: addedToTeamAt
fields.description: The time at which the issue was added to a team.

fields.name: trashed
fields.description: A flag that indicates whether the issue is in the trash bin.

fields.name: snoozedUntilAt
fields.description: The time until an issue will be snoozed in Triage view.

fields.name: suggestionsGeneratedAt
fields.description: [Internal] The time at which the most recent suggestions for this issue were generated.

fields.name: activitySummary
fields.description: [Internal] The activity summary information for this issue.

fields.name: summary
fields.description: [Internal] AI-generated activity summary for this issue.

fields.name: labelIds
fields.description: Identifiers of the labels associated with this issue. Can be used to query the labels directly.

fields.name: team
fields.description: The team that the issue belongs to. Every issue must belong to exactly one team, which determines the available workflow states, labels, and other team-specific configuration.

fields.name: cycle
fields.description: The cycle that the issue is associated with. Null if the issue is not part of any cycle.

fields.name: project
fields.description: The project that the issue is associated with. Null if the issue is not part of any project.

fields.name: projectMilestone
fields.description: The project milestone that the issue is associated with. Null if the issue is not assigned to a specific milestone within its project.

fields.name: lastAppliedTemplate
fields.description: The last template that was applied to this issue.

fields.name: recurringIssueTemplate
fields.description: The recurring issue template that created this issue.

fields.name: previousIdentifiers
fields.description: Previous identifiers of the issue if it has been moved between teams.

fields.name: creator
fields.description: The user who created the issue. Null if the creator's account has been deleted or if the issue was created by an integration or system process.

fields.name: externalUserCreator
fields.description: The external user who created the issue. Set when the issue was created via an integration (e.g., Slack, Intercom) on behalf of a non-Linear user. Null if the issue was created by a Linear user.

fields.name: assignee
fields.description: The user to whom the issue is assigned. Null if the issue is unassigned.

fields.name: delegate
fields.description: The agent user that is delegated to work on this issue. Set when an AI agent has been assigned to perform work on this issue. Null if no agent is working on the issue.

fields.name: snoozedBy
fields.description: The user who snoozed the issue.

fields.name: state
fields.description: The workflow state (issue status) that the issue is currently in. Workflow states represent the issue's progress through the team's workflow, such as Triage, Todo, In Progress, Done, or Canceled.

fields.name: subIssueSortOrder
fields.description: The order of the item in the sub-issue list. Only set if the issue has a parent.

fields.name: reactionData
fields.description: Emoji reaction summary for the issue, grouped by emoji type. Contains the count and reacting user information for each emoji.

fields.name: priorityLabel
fields.description: Label for the priority.

fields.name: sourceComment
fields.description: The comment that this issue was created from, when an issue is created from an existing comment. Null if the issue was not created from a comment.

fields.name: integrationSourceType
fields.description: Integration type that created this issue, if applicable.

fields.name: inheritsSharedAccess
fields.description: Whether this issue inherits shared access from its parent issue.

fields.name: documents
fields.description: Documents associated with the issue.

fields.name: identifier
fields.description: Issue's human readable identifier (e.g. ENG-123).

fields.name: url

fields.name: branchName
fields.description: Suggested branch name for the issue.

fields.name: sharedAccess

fields.name: customerTicketCount
fields.description: Returns the number of Attachment resources which are created by customer support ticketing systems (e.g. Zendesk).

types.name: JSONObject
types.description: The `JSONObject` scalar type represents arbitrary values as *embedded* JSON

types.name: Summary
types.description: An AI-generated summary of an issue. Each issue can have at most one summary. The summary content is stored as ProseMirror data and tracks its generation status and timing.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the entity.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description:
The last time at which the entity was meaningfully updated. This is the same as the creation time if the entity hasn't
    been updated after creation.

fields.name: archivedAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was archived. Null if the entity has not been archived.

fields.name: issue
fields.description: The issue that this summary was generated for.

fields.name: content
fields.description: The summary content as a ProseMirror document containing the AI-generated summary text.

fields.name: evalLogId
fields.description: The evaluation log ID for this summary generation, used for tracking and debugging AI output quality. Null if not available.

fields.name: generationStatus
fields.description: The current generation status of the summary, indicating whether generation is in progress, completed, or failed.

fields.name: generatedAt
fields.description: The time at which the summary content was generated or last regenerated.

types.name: SummaryGenerationStatus
types.description: The generation status of a summary.

types.name: Cycle
types.description: A time-boxed iteration (similar to a sprint) used for planning and tracking work. Cycles belong to a team and have defined start and end dates. Issues are assigned to cycles for time-based planning, and progress is tracked via completed, in-progress, and total scope. Cycles are automatically completed when their end date passes, and uncompleted issues can be carried over to the next cycle.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the entity.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description:
The last time at which the entity was meaningfully updated. This is the same as the creation time if the entity hasn't
    been updated after creation.

fields.name: archivedAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was archived. Null if the entity has not been archived.

fields.name: number
fields.description: The auto-incrementing number of the cycle, unique within its team. This value is assigned automatically by the database and cannot be set on creation.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The custom name of the cycle. If not set, the cycle is displayed using its number (e.g., "Cycle 5").

fields.name: description
fields.description: The description of the cycle.

fields.name: startsAt
fields.description: The start date and time of the cycle.

fields.name: endsAt
fields.description: The end date and time of the cycle. When a cycle is completed prematurely, this is updated to match the completion time. When cycles are disabled, both endsAt and completedAt are set to the current time.

fields.name: completedAt
fields.description: The completion time of the cycle. If null, the cycle has not been completed yet. A cycle is completed either when its end date passes or when it is manually completed early.

fields.name: autoArchivedAt
fields.description: The time at which the cycle was automatically archived by the auto-pruning process. Null if the cycle has not been auto-archived.

fields.name: issueCountHistory
fields.description: The total number of issues in the cycle after each day. Each entry represents a snapshot at the end of that day, forming the basis for burndown charts.

fields.name: completedIssueCountHistory
fields.description: The number of completed issues in the cycle after each day. Each entry corresponds to the same day index as issueCountHistory.

fields.name: scopeHistory
fields.description: The total number of estimation points (scope) in the cycle after each day. Used for scope-based burndown charts.

fields.name: completedScopeHistory
fields.description: The number of completed estimation points after each day. Used together with scopeHistory for burndown charts.

fields.name: inProgressScopeHistory
fields.description: The number of in-progress estimation points after each day. Tracks work that has been started but not yet completed.

fields.name: team
fields.description: The team that the cycle belongs to. Each cycle is scoped to exactly one team.

fields.name: progressHistory
fields.description: [Internal] The detailed progress history of the cycle, including per-status breakdowns over time.

fields.name: currentProgress
fields.description: [Internal] The current progress snapshot of the cycle, broken down by issue status categories.

fields.name: inheritedFrom
fields.description: The parent cycle this cycle was inherited from. When a parent team creates cycles, sub-teams automatically receive corresponding inherited cycles.

fields.name: isActive
fields.description: Whether the cycle is currently active. A cycle is active if the current time is between its start and end dates and it has not been completed.

fields.name: isFuture
fields.description: Whether the cycle has not yet started. True if the cycle's start date is in the future.

fields.name: isPast
fields.description: Whether the cycle's end date has passed.

fields.name: issues
fields.description: Issues that are currently assigned to this cycle.

types.description: Comparator for issue identifiers.

inputFields.name: eq
inputFields.description: Equals constraint.

inputFields.description: Not-equals constraint.

inputFields.name: in
inputFields.description: In-array constraint.

inputFields.name: nin
inputFields.description: Not-in-array constraint.

types.name: DateComparator
types.description: Comparator for dates.

inputFields.name: eq
inputFields.description: Equals constraint.

inputFields.name: neq
inputFields.description: Not-equals constraint.

inputFields.name: in
inputFields.description: In-array constraint.

inputFields.name: nin
inputFields.description: Not-in-array constraint.

inputFields.name: lt
inputFields.description: Less-than constraint. Matches any values that are less than the given value.

inputFields.name: lte
inputFields.description: Less-than-or-equal constraint. Matches any values that are less than or equal to the given value.

inputFields.name: gt
inputFields.description: Greater-than constraint. Matches any values that are greater than the given value.

inputFields.name: gte
inputFields.description: Greater-than-or-equal constraint. Matches any values that are greater than or equal to the given value.

types.name: DateTimeOrDuration
types.description: Represents a date and time in ISO 8601 format. Accepts shortcuts like `2021` to represent midnight Fri Jan 01 2021. Also accepts ISO 8601 durations strings which are added to the current date to create the represented date (e.g '-P2W1D' represents the date that was two weeks and 1 day ago)

types.name: NumberComparator
types.description: Comparator for numbers.

inputFields.name: eqIgnoreCase
inputFields.description: Equals case insensitive. Matches any values that matches the given string case insensitive.

inputFields.name: neqIgnoreCase
inputFields.description: Not-equals case insensitive. Matches any values that don't match the given string case insensitive.

inputFields.name: startsWith
inputFields.description: Starts with constraint. Matches any values that start with the given string.

inputFields.name: startsWithIgnoreCase
inputFields.description: Starts with case insensitive constraint. Matches any values that start with the given string.

inputFields.name: notStartsWith
inputFields.description: Doesn't start with constraint. Matches any values that don't start with the given string.

inputFields.name: endsWith
inputFields.description: Ends with constraint. Matches any values that end with the given string.

inputFields.name: notEndsWith
inputFields.description: Doesn't end with constraint. Matches any values that don't end with the given string.

inputFields.name: contains
inputFields.description: Contains constraint. Matches any values that contain the given string.

inputFields.name: containsIgnoreCase
inputFields.description: Contains case insensitive constraint. Matches any values that contain the given string case insensitive.

inputFields.name: notContains
inputFields.description: Doesn't contain constraint. Matches any values that don't contain the given string.

inputFields.name: notContainsIgnoreCase
inputFields.description: Doesn't contain case insensitive constraint. Matches any values that don't contain the given string case insensitive.

inputFields.name: containsIgnoreCaseAndAccent
inputFields.description: Contains case and accent insensitive constraint. Matches any values that contain the given string case and accent insensitive.

types.name: Duration
types.description: Represents a duration in ISO 8601 format. Accepts ISO 8601 duration strings or integers in milliseconds.

types.name: Int
types.description: The `Int` scalar type represents non-fractional signed whole numeric values. Int can represent values between -(2^31) and 2^31 - 1.

types.name: EntityExternalLink
types.description: An external link attached to a Linear entity such as an initiative, project, team, release, or cycle. External links provide a way to reference related resources outside of Linear (e.g., documentation, design files, dashboards) directly from the entity's resources section. Each link has a URL, display label, and sort order within its parent entity.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the entity.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description:
The last time at which the entity was meaningfully updated. This is the same as the creation time if the entity hasn't
    been updated after creation.

fields.name: archivedAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was archived. Null if the entity has not been archived.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The link's URL.

fields.name: label
fields.description: The link's label.

fields.name: sortOrder
fields.description: The sort order of this link within the parent entity's resources list. Links are sorted together with documents and other resources attached to the entity.

fields.name: creator
fields.description: The user who created the link.

fields.name: initiative
fields.description: The initiative that the link is associated with.

fields.name: project
fields.description: The project that the link is associated with.

types.name: Initiative
types.description: An initiative is a high-level strategic grouping of projects toward a business goal. Initiatives can contain multiple projects, have their own status updates and health tracking, and can be organized hierarchically with parent-child relationships.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the entity.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description:
The last time at which the entity was meaningfully updated. This is the same as the creation time if the entity hasn't
    been updated after creation.

fields.name: archivedAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was archived. Null if the entity has not been archived.

fields.name: updateReminderFrequencyInWeeks
fields.description: The n-weekly frequency at which to prompt for updates. When not set, reminders are inherited from workspace.

fields.name: updateReminderFrequency
fields.description: The frequency at which to prompt for updates. When not set, reminders are inherited from workspace.

fields.name: frequencyResolution
fields.description: The resolution of the reminder frequency.

fields.name: updateRemindersDay
fields.description: The day at which to prompt for updates.

fields.name: updateRemindersHour
fields.description: The hour at which to prompt for updates.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the initiative.

fields.name: description
fields.description: The description of the initiative.

fields.name: organization
fields.description: The workspace of the initiative.

fields.name: creator
fields.description: The user who created the initiative.

fields.name: owner
fields.description: The user who owns the initiative. The owner is typically responsible for posting status updates and driving the initiative to completion. Null if no owner is assigned.

fields.name: slugId
fields.description: The initiative's unique URL slug, used to construct human-readable URLs.

fields.name: sortOrder
fields.description: The sort order of the initiative within the workspace.

fields.name: color
fields.description: The initiative's color.

fields.name: icon
fields.description: The icon of the initiative. Can be an emoji or a decorative icon type.

fields.name: trashed
fields.description: A flag that indicates whether the initiative is in the trash bin.

fields.name: facets
fields.description: [Internal] Facets associated with the initiative, used for filtering and categorization.

fields.name: targetDate
fields.description: The estimated completion date of the initiative. Null if no target date is set.

fields.name: targetDateResolution
fields.description: The resolution of the initiative's estimated completion date, indicating whether it refers to a specific day, week, month, quarter, or year.

fields.name: status
fields.description: The lifecycle status of the initiative. One of Planned, Active, Completed.

fields.name: lastUpdate
fields.description: The most recent status update posted for this initiative. Null if no updates have been posted.

fields.name: health
fields.description: The overall health of the initiative, derived from the most recent initiative update. Possible values are onTrack, atRisk, or offTrack. Null if no health has been reported.

fields.name: healthUpdatedAt
fields.description: The time at which the initiative health was last updated, typically when a new initiative update is posted. Null if health has never been set.

fields.name: startedAt
fields.description: The time at which the initiative was moved into Active status. Null if the initiative has not been activated.

fields.name: completedAt
fields.description: The time at which the initiative was moved into Completed status. Null if the initiative has not been completed.

fields.name: labelIds
fields.description: [Internal] The IDs of the initiative labels associated with this initiative.

fields.name: url
fields.description: Initiative URL.

fields.name: projects
fields.description: Projects associated with the initiative.

types.name: InitiativeUpdate
types.description: A status update posted to an initiative. Initiative updates communicate progress, health, and blockers to stakeholders. Each update captures the initiative's health at the time of writing and includes a rich-text body with the update content.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the entity.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description:
The last time at which the entity was meaningfully updated. This is the same as the creation time if the entity hasn't
    been updated after creation.

fields.name: archivedAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was archived. Null if the entity has not been archived.

fields.name: body
fields.description: The update content in markdown format.

fields.name: editedAt
fields.description: The time the update was edited.

fields.name: reactionData
fields.description: Emoji reaction summary, grouped by emoji type.

fields.name: bodyData
fields.description: [Internal] The content of the update as a Prosemirror document.

fields.name: slugId
fields.description: The update's unique URL slug.

fields.name: initiative
fields.description: The initiative that this status update was posted to.

fields.name: user
fields.description: The user who wrote the update.

fields.name: health
fields.description: The health of the initiative at the time this update was posted. Possible values are onTrack, atRisk, or offTrack.

fields.name: infoSnapshot
fields.description: [Internal] A snapshot of initiative properties at the time the update was posted, including project statuses, sub-initiative health, and target dates. Used to compute diffs between consecutive updates.

fields.name: isDiffHidden
fields.description: Whether the diff between this update and the previous one should be hidden in the UI.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The URL to the initiative update.

fields.name: isStale
fields.description: Whether the initiative update is stale.

fields.name: diff
fields.description: The diff between the current update and the previous one.

fields.name: diffMarkdown
fields.description: The diff between the current update and the previous one, formatted as markdown.

fields.name: reactions
fields.description: Reactions associated with the initiative update.

fields.name: comments
fields.description: Comments associated with the initiative update.

args.name: filter
args.description: Filter returned comments.

args.name: before
args.description: A cursor to be used with last for backward pagination.

args.name: after
args.description: A cursor to be used with first for forward pagination

args.name: first
args.description: The number of items to forward paginate (used with after). Defaults to 50.

args.name: last
args.description: The number of items to backward paginate (used with before). Defaults to 50.

args.name: includeArchived
args.description: Should archived resources be included (default: false)

args.name: orderBy
args.description: By which field should the pagination order by. Available options are createdAt (default) and updatedAt.

fields.name: commentCount
fields.description: Number of comments associated with the initiative update.

types.name: InitiativeUpdateHealthType
types.description: The health type when the update is created.

types.name: Reaction
types.description: An emoji reaction on a comment, issue, project update, initiative update, post, pull request, or pull request comment. Each reaction is associated with exactly one parent entity and is created by either a workspace user or an external user. Reactions are persisted individually but surfaced on their parent entities as aggregated reactionData.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the entity.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description:
The last time at which the entity was meaningfully updated. This is the same as the creation time if the entity hasn't
    been updated after creation.

fields.name: archivedAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was archived. Null if the entity has not been archived.

fields.name: emoji
fields.description: The name of the emoji used for this reaction. For custom workspace emojis, this is the custom emoji name; for standard emojis, this is the normalized emoji name.

fields.name: issue
fields.description: The issue that the reaction is associated with. Null if the reaction belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: comment
fields.description: The comment that the reaction is associated with. Null if the reaction belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: projectUpdate
fields.description: The project update that the reaction is associated with. Null if the reaction belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: initiativeUpdate
fields.description: The initiative update that the reaction is associated with. Null if the reaction belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: post
fields.description: The post that the reaction is associated with. Null if the reaction belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: user
fields.description: The workspace user that created the reaction. Null if the reaction was created by an external user through an integration.

fields.name: externalUser
fields.description: The external user that created the reaction through an integration. Null if the reaction was created by a workspace user.

types.name: Comment
types.description: A comment associated with an issue, project update, initiative update, document content, post, project, or initiative. Comments support rich text (ProseMirror), emoji reactions, and threaded replies via parentId. Comments can be created by workspace users or by external users through integrations (e.g., Slack, Intercom). Each comment belongs to exactly one parent entity.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the entity.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description:
The last time at which the entity was meaningfully updated. This is the same as the creation time if the entity hasn't
    been updated after creation.

fields.name: archivedAt
fields.description: The time at which the entity was archived. Null if the entity has not been archived.

fields.name: body
fields.description: The comment content in markdown format. This is a derived representation of the canonical bodyData ProseMirror content.

fields.name: issue
fields.description: The issue that the comment is associated with. Null if the comment belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: issueId
fields.description: The ID of the issue that the comment is associated with. Null if the comment belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: documentContent
fields.description: The document content that the comment is associated with. Null if the comment belongs to a different parent entity type. Used for inline comments on documents.

fields.name: documentContentId
fields.description: The ID of the document content that the comment is associated with. Null if the comment belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: projectUpdate
fields.description: The project update that the comment is associated with. Null if the comment belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: projectUpdateId
fields.description: The ID of the project update that the comment is associated with. Null if the comment belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: initiativeUpdate
fields.description: The initiative update that the comment is associated with. Null if the comment belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: initiativeUpdateId
fields.description: The ID of the initiative update that the comment is associated with. Null if the comment belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: post
fields.description: The post that the comment is associated with. Null if the comment belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: project
fields.description: The project that the comment is associated with. Used for project-level discussion threads. Null if the comment belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: projectId
fields.description: The ID of the project that the comment is associated with. Null if the comment belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: initiative
fields.description: The initiative that the comment is associated with. Null if the comment belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: initiativeId
fields.description: The ID of the initiative that the comment is associated with. Null if the comment belongs to a different parent entity type.

fields.name: parent
fields.description: The parent comment under which the current comment is nested. Null for top-level comments that are not replies.

fields.name: parentId
fields.description: The ID of the parent comment under which the current comment is nested. Null for top-level comments.

fields.name: resolvingUser
fields.description: The user that resolved the comment thread. Null if the thread has not been resolved or if this is not a top-level comment.

fields.name: resolvedAt
fields.description: The time when the comment thread was resolved. Null if the thread is unresolved.

fields.name: resolvingComment
fields.description: The child comment that resolved this thread. Only set on top-level (parent) comments. Null if the thread is unresolved.

fields.name: resolvingCommentId
fields.description: The ID of the child comment that resolved this thread. Null if the thread is unresolved.

fields.name: user
fields.description: The user who wrote the comment. Null for comments created by integrations or bots without a user association.

fields.name: externalUser
fields.description: The external user who wrote the comment, when the comment was created through an integration such as Slack or Intercom. Null for comments created by workspace users.

fields.name: editedAt
fields.description: The time the comment was last edited by its author. Null if the comment has not been edited since creation.

fields.name: bodyData
fields.description: [Internal] The comment content as a ProseMirror document. This is the canonical rich-text representation of the comment body.

fields.name: quotedText
fields.description: The text that this comment references, used for inline comments on documents or issue descriptions. Null for standard comments that do not quote specific text.

fields.name: reactionData
fields.description: Emoji reaction summary for this comment, grouped by emoji type. Each entry contains the emoji name, count, and the IDs of users who reacted.

fields.name: threadSummary
fields.description: [Internal] An AI-generated summary of the comment thread. Null if no summary has been generated or if this is not a top-level comment.

fields.name: isArtificialAgentSessionRoot
fields.description: [Internal] Whether the comment is an artificial placeholder for an agent session thread created without a comment mention.

fields.name: url
fields.description: Comment's URL.

fields.name: children
fields.description: The children of the comment.
